meta.notes: Engine used: Minimax Hailuo-2.3-Fast (NOT Kling). Benchmark prompt specified Minimax for speed; correct default engine per SKILL.md is Kling (with kling_via_fal fallback). This run measures Minimax path. Lipsync: LTX-2.3 via FAL (fal-ai/ltx-2.3/audio-to-video). socksio was missing for httpx[socks] — installed at runtime (434ms penalty on first Gemini call). Audio: Apple Music 30s preview.

test_input.name: APT. — ROSÉ & Bruno Mars (Apple Music 30s preview)
test_input.description: 30s Apple Music preview, auto-downloaded via apple-music-reference script

task.name: music-video
task.purpose: Full e2e music video generation: Apple Music 30s preview → shot script → keyframes → 9 parallel clips (Minimax i2v + LTX-2.3 lipsync) → assembly → karaoke captions → CDN upload
task.expected_output: A 29.95s 1080×1920 9:16 vertical mp4 with karaoke captions, delivered via CDN

install.notes: Skill pre-installed at /Users/rinko/nova3-agent-skills. No install step.

asset_acquisition.notes: apple_music_search: 3156ms, convert_m4a_to_mp3: 411ms. Song: APT. by ROSÉ & Bruno Mars, 29.95s preview.

steps.name: shot_script_gen
steps.notes: LLM generates 9-clip shot script for 29.95s audio. Types: 2 empty, 3 character, 1 broll_instrument, 3 lipsync.

steps.name: character_ref_gen
steps.notes: Gemini text-to-image (gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview, 1K). Output: 1.2MB jpg. Note: first call failed due to missing socksio (434ms penalty), retried successfully.

steps.name: keyframe_gen
steps.notes: Gemini API, 9 clips sequential. All 9 keyframes generated (1.2–2.1MB each). Grid: grid_batch01.png.

steps.name: audio_seg_extract
steps.notes: ffmpeg: 3 audio segments extracted for lipsync clips (004, 006, 009).

steps.name: parallel_video_gen
steps.notes: 3 parallel workers (wall clock). W1: 222.8s (clips 001-003, Minimax); W2: 174s (clips 004-006, LTX+Minimax); W3: 211s (clips 007-009, Minimax+LTX). Longest worker determined wall time. 6 Minimax i2v clips + 3 LTX-2.3 lipsync clips.

steps.name: assembly
steps.notes: normalize: 27972ms (9 clips → 1080×1920 @30fps), concat: 219ms, audio_mix: 340ms. Output: raw_audio.mp4 18024KB.

steps.name: captions
steps.notes: faster-whisper (small, CPU), detected Korean, style: karaoke --no-vad. 36 words. CJK font: AppleSDGothicNeo. Output: final.mp4 38404KB.

execution.notes: llm_overhead_s is shot_script_gen only (measurable LLM-only step). Worker coordination/subagent LLM overhead is embedded in parallel_video_gen wall time.

tokens.notes: extracted via extract-cc-tokens.py --after 2026-04-13T09:50:35Z --before 2026-04-13T10:04:02Z. effective_input_tokens=3030694 (input+cache_read+cache_write). Includes main + 3 worker subagents (45 messages total, 37 filtered outside window).
